name: r/d weight reduction dog food
description: even a little extra weight can impact the pet's quality of life and relationship with family because that extra weight can reduce play time, impact mobility and affect the lifelong general health of your dog. hill's nutritionists & veterinarians developed prescription diet r/d clinical nutrition specially formulated to support dogs' weight loss. in fact, r/d is clinically proven nutrition for healthy weight loss in just 8 weeks. this wet food has an irresistible taste that your dog will love.
